summary: Template Library feature tested. All 18 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI tests pass: 8 template cards display, category filtering works (All, Legal, Real Estate, Business, Estate Planning), search works, preview modal shows all details (Est. Time, Signers, Notarization Required, Required Fields), 'Use Template' navigates to Request Notarization with pre-filled data, template banner shows when from template, 'Browse Templates' link shows when not from template.

issues: React DevTools hydration warning about <span> in <select> - cosmetic, appears to be instrumentation related, not actual code bug

critical_code_review_comments: Good: Template seeding on startup ensures 8 default templates always available
Good: All required data-testid attributes present for testing
Good: Clean separation - TemplateLibrary.jsx handles template browsing, RequestNotarization handles template state
Good: Template state passed via React Router location.state - clean approach
Good: Category filtering and search work correctly with backend API
Good: Preview modal shows all required info (fields, est time, signers, notarization req)
Good: Dashboard has Templates quick action button for discoverability

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all UI elements and flows working

seed_data_creation: Templates are auto-seeded on server startup via seed_templates() in template_routes.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Template Library feature is complete and fully functional. 8 default templates seeded: Power of Attorney, Lease Agreement, Affidavit, Last Will & Testament, NDA, Real Estate Purchase Agreement, Revocable Living Trust, General Service Contract. Categories: legal (2), real_estate (2), business (2), estate (2). API uses trailing slash /api/templates/.

backend_api.GET /api/templates/: Returns all 8 templates with categories - PASS
backend_api.GET /api/templates/tpl_nda: Returns NDA template by ID - PASS
backend_api.Authentication required: All endpoints return 401/403 without token - PASS

frontend_ui.template_library_page: Loads at /templates with 8 cards in grid - PASS
frontend_ui.category_filtering: All 4 category filters work correctly - PASS
frontend_ui.preview_modal: Shows template details, fields, meta info - PASS
frontend_ui.use_template_flow: Navigates to /request-notarization with pre-filled data - PASS
frontend_ui.template_banner: Shows 'Template Applied' when from template - PASS
frontend_ui.browse_templates_link: Shows when not from template - PASS
